target:
assert fizzbuzz(3) == 'fizz'
assert fizzbuzz(5) == 'buzz'
assert fizzbuzz(15) == 'fizzbuzz'
assert fizzbuzz(7) == 7
assert fizzbuzz(1) == 1

assert abs_diff(5, 3) == 2
assert abs_diff(3, 5) == 2
assert abs_diff(-1, 1) == 2
assert abs_diff(0, 0) == 0
assert abs_diff(-5, -3) == 2

assert count_vowels('hello') == 2
assert count_vowels('AEIOU') == 5
assert count_vowels('xyz') == 0
assert count_vowels('') == 0
assert count_vowels('a b c d e') == 2

assert max_of_three(1, 2, 3) == 3
assert max_of_three(3, 2, 1) == 3
assert max_of_three(1, 3, 2) == 3
assert max_of_three(-1, -2, -3) == -1
assert max_of_three(5, 5, 5) == 5

assert title_case(['hello', 'world']) == 'Hello World'
assert title_case(['a', 'b', 'c']) == 'A B C'
assert title_case(['']) == ''
assert title_case(['UPPER', 'lower']) == 'Upper Lower'
assert title_case(['one']) == 'One'
